nodes.name: Myiomela
nodes.summary: Myiomela（Myiomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如白尾蓝地鸲、Sumatran blue robin、Javan blue robin。

nodes.name: Sumatran blue robin
nodes.summary: Sumatran blue robin（Myiomela sumatrana）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sumatran blue robin。

nodes.name: Sumatran blue robin
nodes.summary: The Sumatran blue robin (Myiomela sumatrana) is an Old World flycatcher in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the Indonesian island of Sumatra. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the Javan blue robin (M. diana), with the two being united under the name Sunda robin, but a 2020 study found them to represent distinct species. M. sumatrana can be physically distinguished from M. diana by its much darker plumage in both males and females. References
